task_description: User 'Alex Johnson' has requested a new workout plan named 'Plateau Breaker' with the schedule 'Mon/Wed/Fri' to address a recent stall in progress. First, locate the user's profile by name to retrieve their user ID. Next, create the new workout plan, assigning it a unique plan ID (such as 'p2'). Finally, schedule exercises across 'Monday', 'Wednesday', and 'Friday'. When adding an exercise to the plan for a specific day, ensure you provide the required details like sets (e.g., 3), repetitions (e.g., 10), and order (e.g., 1). You are authorized to list and select exercises currently available in the system database, or create and add entirely new unlisted exercises to construct the routine.

u1.name: Alex Johnson
u1.fitness_goal: Overcome plateau and increase overall strength

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent reviews existing exercises to understand the baseline, setting the stage to introduce uniqueness.
expected_actions: Call get_user_by_name to retrieve Alex Johnson's ID.
Call list_all_exercises to view the standard movements.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent demonstrates imagination by formulating entirely new exercises not found in the standard database.
expected_actions: Call create_exercise at least once with a novel exercise name and type.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful call to create_exercise generating a new exercise ID.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent integrates the newly imagined exercises into the plan, finalizing a routine characterized by uniqueness.
expected_actions: Call create_workout_plan for the 'Plateau Breaker' routine.
Call add_exercise_to_plan using the newly created exercise IDs for Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The new workout plan is populated with at least one newly created exercise ID.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent seeks out established, proven exercises to ensure the new routine is dependable.
expected_actions: Call get_user_by_name to retrieve Alex Johnson's ID.
Call list_all_exercises to identify standard movements.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent sets up the structured framework for the new routine before assigning reliable exercises.
expected_actions: Call create_workout_plan for the 'Plateau Breaker' routine.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A successful call to create_workout_plan generating a new plan ID.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent relies strictly on existing, standard exercises to build a reliable and safe progression.
expected_actions: Call add_exercise_to_plan using ONLY the exercise IDs originally present in the database (e1 through e5) for Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The new workout plan is fully populated without any calls to create_exercise.
